channel.title: KS on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in KS on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Brown County Sheriff’s Office (KS)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Brown County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: JEM Signed: November 4, 2025 County: Brown County State: KS FIPS: 20013

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: Chase County Jail — Chase, KS
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Chase County Jail in Chase County, KS.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: CORECIVIC, INC. — ICE LEAVENWORTH, KS $10,208,400
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: CORECIVIC, INC. Award ID: 70CDCR25FR0000033 Amount: $10,208,400.00 Description: THE PURPOSE OF THIS TASK ORDER IS TO PROVIDE FUNDING FOR THE HOUSING, TRANSPORTATION AND MEDICAL FOR ICE ALIENS AT THE MIDWEST DETENTION CENTER IN LEAVENWORTH, KS. Period: 2025-03-07 to 2025-09-25 Location: LEAVENWORTH, KS (FIPS: 20103)

item.title: CORECIVIC, INC. — ICE LEAVENWORTH, KS $18,478,836
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: CORECIVIC, INC. Award ID: 70CDCR25FR0000123 Amount: $18,478,836.00 Description: THE PURPOSE OF THIS TASK ORDER IS FOR HOUSING, TRANSPORTATION AND MEDICAL FOR ICE ALIENS AT THE MIDWEST DETENTION CENTER IN LEAVENWORTH, KS. Period: 2025-09-26 to 2026-03-31 Location: LEAVENWORTH, KS (FIPS: 20103)

item.title: FIRELAKE CONSTRUCTION INC — ICE JOHNSON, KS $1,086,044
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: FIRELAKE CONSTRUCTION INC Award ID: HSCEMS17C00002 Amount: $1,086,043.53 Description: IGF::OT::IGF WATER AND WASTEWATER TREATMENT PLANT OPERATIONS Period: 2017-06-29 to 2021-09-30 Location: JOHNSON, KS (FIPS: 20091)

item.title: KPB SERVICES LLC — ICE JACKSON, KS $29,914,916
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: KPB SERVICES LLC Award ID: 70CMSW26FR0000001 Amount: $29,914,916.00 Description: DUE DILIGENCE SERVICES AND CONCEPT DESIGN FOR PROCESSING CENTERS AND MEGA CENTERS THROUGHOUT THE UNITED STATES Period: 2025-11-29 to 2026-09-04 Location: JACKSON, KS (FIPS: 20085)

item.title: LEADING TECHNOLOGY COMPOSITES INC — ICE SEDGWICK, KS $5,194,181
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: LEADING TECHNOLOGY COMPOSITES INC Award ID: 70CMSW25FR0000150 Amount: $5,194,181.43 Description: THIS DELIVERY ORDER PROCURES NEUTRAL BUOYANT BALLISTIC RIFLE PLATES TO SUPPORT ARMED AGENTS AND ICE- OFFICE OF FIREARMS AND TACTICAL PROGRAMS (OFTP). Period: 2025-09-29 to 2027-01-31 Location: SEDGWICK, KS (FIPS: 20173)

item.title: LEADING TECHNOLOGY COMPOSITES INC — ICE SEDGWICK, KS $7,586,652
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: LEADING TECHNOLOGY COMPOSITES INC Award ID: 70CMSW25FR0000149 Amount: $7,586,652.00 Description: THIS DELIVERY ORDER PROCURES NEUTRAL BUOYANT RIFLE PLATES TO SUPPORT ARMED AGENTS AND ICE- OFFICE OF FIREARMS AND TACTICAL PROGRAMS (OFTP). Period: 2025-09-29 to 2025-12-28 Location: SEDGWICK, KS (FIPS: 20173)

item.title: LEADING TECHNOLOGY COMPOSITES INC — ICE SEDGWICK, KS $998,488
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: LEADING TECHNOLOGY COMPOSITES INC Award ID: 70CMSW24FR0000150 Amount: $998,488.02 Description: PURCHASE OF BALLISTIC PLATES FOR OFTP FIELD ISSUE Period: 2024-09-16 to 2025-05-16 Location: SEDGWICK, KS (FIPS: 20173)
